subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Spirit of God! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God that thou hast seeing eyes and hearing ears.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @The Holy Spirit
